name: com.beamable.notifications
description: Cross-platform Beamable notifications SDK for Unity (iOS + Android): local + remote push, deep links, templates, action buttons, rich media, closed-app analytics.

samples.description: IMGUI test harness exercising local/remote notifications + deep links, plus a sample native receive-time handler (DiscordWebhookPushHandler) that posts a webhook while the app is closed.
